# AsterDB Roadmap Fixture

Build a database laboratory from runtime and measurement foundations through storage, query processing, transactions, distribution, and operational hardening.

Every stage must specify invariants, implement a simple baseline, instrument it, inject failures, compare an alternative, and preserve tests plus benchmarks. Stage 0 establishes strict TypeScript, binary codecs, runtime measurement, fault injection, and a CLI shell. Later stages depend on that foundation and must not be implemented early.
